name: MIA KHALIFA,ABELLA DANGER, ANGELA WHITE, SUNNY LEONE AND BRIDGETTE B
description:
SUNNY LEONE:-Karenjit "Karen"[3][4] Kaur Vohra (born May 13, 1981), known by her stage name Sunny Leone, is an actress, model, and former pornographic actress.[5][6] She was born in Canada to an Indian Punjabi Sikh family and holds dual Canadian and American citizenship. She was named Penthouse Pet of the Year in 2003, was a contract performer for Vivid Entertainment, and was named by Maxim as one of the 12 top porn stars in 2010. She was inducted into the AVN Hall of Fame in 2018.[7]

MIA KHALIFA:-Mia Khalifa is a Lebanese-American media personality and an ex/retired porn star. She gained significant attention and controversy during her brief career in the adult industry in 2014-2015. After leaving ABELLA DANGER:-Abella Danger is an American pornographic actress and model. She entered the adult film industry in 2014 and quickly became one of its most popular performers. Known for her performances and strong social media presence, Danger has also branched out into mainstream modeling and acting. She has received several awards in the adult entertainment industry and continues to be an influential figure within it.

ANGELA WHITE:-Angela White is an Australian pornographic actress, director, and producer. She began her career in the adult film industry in 2003 and has since become one of its most well-known and highly awarded performers. White is recognized for her prolific work, professionalism, and advocacy for sex workers' rights. She has also directed and produced numerous films, establishing herself as a significant figure in the industry both in front of and behind the camera.

BRIDGETTE B:-Bridgette B, also known as the "Spanish Doll," is a Spanish-American pornographic actress and model. She entered the adult film industry in 2008 and has since become known for her performances and distinctive look. Bridgette B has won several awards and nominations in the industry and has built a substantial fan base. She is also recognized for her work ethic and presence on social media platforms.
